# Astro Rattan

> Comprehensive Vedic astrology platform offering free Kundli generation, daily horoscope, Panchang, KP system, Lal Kitab remedies, numerology, tarot, Vastu Shastra, and live astrologer consultations. Bilingual (English + हिन्दी).

## Background

Astro Rattan is built on classical Vedic astrology principles (Parashara, Phaladeepika, Lal Kitab) with calculations validated against Drik Panchang for astronomical accuracy. The platform is designed for both novice users seeking practical guidance and serious students of jyotish.

## Key Pages

- [Free Kundli Generator](https://astrorattan.com/kundli): Generate a complete birth chart (Lagna, Navamsa, divisional charts D-1 through D-108, dashas, ashtakvarga, shadbala, yogas, doshas) from birth date, time, and place.
- [Daily Horoscope](https://astrorattan.com/horoscope): Moon-sign-based daily predictions for all 12 zodiac signs.
- [Panchang & Muhurat](https://astrorattan.com/panchang): Daily Panchang (Tithi, Nakshatra, Yoga, Karana, Vara), auspicious muhurats, Sankranti dates, festival calendar.
- [Lal Kitab Remedies](https://astrorattan.com/lal-kitab): Practical remedies from the Lal Kitab system organized by planet, house, and life area (20+ analysis tabs).
- [Numerology & Tarot](https://astrorattan.com/numerology): Life path, destiny, personal year numbers; daily tarot guidance.
- [Vastu Shastra](https://astrorattan.com/vastu): Floor-plan-based vastu analysis with compound warnings and prioritized remedies.
- [Astrology Blog](https://astrorattan.com/blog): Long-form editorial guides on Vedic astrology fundamentals and accuracy.
- [About](https://astrorattan.com/about): Platform overview, methodology, and contact.

## Technical

- Site is a single-page React application (React 19 + Vite + Tailwind).
- Calculation engine is a Python backend using Swiss Ephemeris.
- Bilingual: English (en-IN) and Hindi (hi-IN); language toggle in nav.

## License

Content on Astro Rattan may be cited and summarized for AI-assisted research and educational purposes. Quote with attribution to https://astrorattan.com.
